title: Cloud Boots
description: Adds Cloud Boots, which grant speed and jump boost!
body:
[![kinetichosting](https://i.imgur.com/2HlGnLM.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=102)
## Cloud Boots

![cloudbootsbanner](https://i.imgur.com/q2CUAyS.png)

[![Discord badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/f8Nnj5VuFj)
[![Ko-Fi badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular-alt_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tiviacz1337)  

## Features  

**Cloud Boots** - Old version of Cloud Boots (Unobtainable)  
**Iron Cloud Boots** - 5% Additional Speed, Jump Boost II, immunity to fall damage  
**Gold Cloud Boots** - 10% Additional Speed, Jump Boost III, immunity to fall damage  
**Diamond Cloud Boots** - 15% Additional Speed, Jump Boost IV, immunity to fall damage   
**Netherite Cloud Boots** - 20% Additional Speed, Jump Boost V, immunity to fall damage     

**Golden Feather** - if player holds item in main or second hand, grants **immunity to fall damage**. Golden Feather has durability of 385. Can be repaired with gold ingots. Can be worn in Curio/Trinket slot, if Curios API/Trinkets (Trinkets 1.17.1+) is installed.

![atlas](https://i.imgur.com/3WiRD6M.png)

## Recipes

- Golden Feather

![recipe2](https://i.imgur.com/a4PCgJ0.png)

- Cloud Boots
